description:
There is no native app — Desiderio lives in your TYPO3 install. One Composer command installs all 255 elements free under GPL-2.0, one more seeds the full styleguide.
Store badges and QR code are demo placeholders.
copyright: © 2026 webconsulting studio. Desiderio is GPL-2.0 licensed.

qr_image.title: Desiderio content wizard
qr_image.alternative: TYPO3 new-content wizard listing all 10 Desiderio element groups. Demo placeholder shown in the QR code slot.
qr_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed, used as a demo placeholder for the QR code slot.
